us_markets.note: Week of May 11-15 close — volatile week, tech selloff Friday

sp500.note: Pulled back from Thursday's all-time high (7501). Friday selloff erased gains.

dow.note: Below 50,000 again. Lost 500+ pts Friday on tech slump.

nasdaq.note: AI rout Friday, DeepSeek news spooked tech names.

10y_treasury_yield.note: Yields rising on inflation fears + oil spike

us_markets.key_story: Week ended on a sour note. S&P 500 hit a fresh all-time high Thursday at 7501 but plunged Friday as tech slumped on DeepSeek AI competition fears. Dow lost 500+ points. Berkshire's new CEO overhauled portfolio. Kevin Warsh faces Fed rate-cut debate. Gold near record highs above $4,500. Oil above $100 on Hormuz closure concerns.

week_ahead.fed_watch: Rate path uncertainty — Warsh's first major test

hsi.note: Lower on Taiwan tensions after Trump-Xi summit

asia_markets.key_event: Trump-Xi Beijing summit concluded. Taiwan stance ambiguity weighing on sentiment. G7 finance ministers to meet on Hormuz situation.

crypto.note: Crypto recovering slightly after Friday's risk-off. BTC holding $78K. Fear index at 27.
